description.en: The feature's intrinsic cardinality: true = the value IS a bare LIST of its shape, `[shape, shape, …]`, with nothing wrapping it (refs rows, register maps, per-string install facts). Every member is enumerated; there is no count or aggregate envelope — that is `repeated`. Plural slug = array, per the naming rule. Exclusive with `map` (a slug-keyed record) and with `repeated` (the counted-instance envelope).
